ActionCondition.description: The condition of the action desired in the filter.

AdvancedEventSelector.description: An advanced event selector that includes optional name and field selectors

FieldSelectors.description: Contains all selector statements in an advanced event selector.

Name.description: An optional descriptive name for the advanced event selector

AdvancedFieldSelector.description: A single selector statement in an advanced event selector.

EndsWith.description: An operator that includes events that match the last few characters of the event record field specified as the value of Field.

Equals.description: An operator that includes events that match the exact value of the event record field specified as the value of Field.

Field.description: A field in a CloudTrail event record on which to filter events to be logged

NotEndsWith.description: An operator that excludes events that match the last few characters of the event record field specified as the value of Field.

NotEquals.description: An operator that excludes events that match the exact value of the event record field specified as the value of Field.

NotStartsWith.description: An operator that excludes events that match the first few characters of the event record field specified as the value of Field.

StartsWith.description: An operator that includes events that match the first few characters of the event record field specified as the value of Field.

AllowFieldUpdates.description: When true, configuration drift in managed telemetry resources will be detected and remediated for resource-level fields.

AdvancedEventSelectors.description: Create fine-grained selectors for AWS CloudTrail management and data.

Conditions.description: A list of conditions for a filter.

ELBLoadBalancerLoggingParameters.description: Telemetry parameters for ELB/NLB Load Balancer Logs

FieldDelimiter.description: A delimiter to delineate log fields

FieldToMatch.description: The field that we want to match this rule to.

Method.description: The method with which to match this rule.

QueryString.description: The query string to find the resource to match this field to.

UriPath.description: This is the URI path to match this rule to.

FilterBehavior.description: The behavior required of the filter.

FilterRequirement.description: The requirement portion of the filter.

Filters.description: A list of filters to be applied.

LabelNameCondition.description: The label name of the condition.

LabelName.description: The label name of the condition.

LoggingFilter.description: Default handling for logs that don't match any of the specified filtering conditions.

RedactedFields.description: Fields not to be included in the logs.

RegionStatus.description: Status of a telemetry rule in a specific region

RuleArn.description: The ARN of the rule in this region

Status.description: The replication status of the rule in this region

ResourceType.description: Resource Type associated with the Telemetry Rule

RetentionInDays.description: Number of days to retain the telemetry data in the specified destination

Scope.description: Selection Criteria on scope level for rule application

SelectionCriteria.description: Selection Criteria on resource level for rule application

SingleHeader.description: Header for the field to match.

Tag.description: A key-value pair to associate with a resource

Key.description: The key name of the tag. You can specify a value that is 1 to 128 Unicode characters in length and cannot be prefixed with aws:. You can use any of the following characters: the set of Unicode letters, digits, whitespace, _, ., /, =, +, and -.

Value.description: The value for the tag. You can specify a value that is 0 to 256 Unicode characters in length and cannot be prefixed with aws:. You can use any of the following characters: the set of Unicode letters, digits, whitespace, _, ., /, =, +, and -.

TelemetryDestinationConfiguration.description: The destination configuration for telemetry data

AllRegions.description: When true, the rule is replicated to all supported regions

Regions.description: List of AWS region codes where the rule should be replicated

TelemetrySourceType.description: The telemetry source type that goes into the array.

TelemetrySourceTypes.description: The telemetry source types for a telemetry rule.

TelemetryType.description: Telemetry Type associated with the Telemetry Rule

VPCFlowLogParameters.description: Telemetry parameters for VPC Flow logs

LogFormat.description: The fields to include in the flow log record. If you omit this parameter, the flow log is created using the default format.

MaxAggregationInterval.description: The maximum interval of time, in seconds, during which a flow of packets is captured and aggregated into a flow log record. Default is 600s.

TrafficType.description: The type of traffic captured for the flow log. Default is ALL

WAFLogType.description: The type of logs to generate for WAF.

WAFLoggingParameters.description: Telemetry parameters for WAF v2 Web ACL

RedactedFields.description: Fields not to be included in the logs.

description: The AWS::ObservabilityAdmin::TelemetryRule resource defines a CloudWatch Observability Admin Telemetry Rule.

RegionStatuses.description: Per-region replication status of the rule

RuleArn.description: The arn of the telemetry rule

RuleName.description: The name of the telemetry rule

Tags.description: An array of key-value pairs to apply to this resource
